tournament_match_distinct_sides.name: tournament_match_distinct_sides
tournament_match_distinct_sides.value: "tournament_matches"."side_a_entry_id" is null or "tournament_matches"."side_b_entry_id" is null or "tournament_matches"."side_a_entry_id" <> "tournament_matches"."side_b_entry_id"

tournaments_type_settings_valid.name: tournaments_type_settings_valid
tournaments_type_settings_valid.value: ("tournaments"."type" = 'ELIMINATION' and "tournaments"."best_of" is not null and "tournaments"."win_points" is null and "tournaments"."draw_points" is null and "tournaments"."loss_points" is null) or ("tournaments"."type" = 'LEAGUE' and "tournaments"."best_of" is null and "tournaments"."win_points" is not null and "tournaments"."loss_points" is not null)
